title: VayuDrishti hourly feature-store (parquet)
grain: one row per (station_id, ts_utc): measured pollutants plus co-located meteo, satellite, upwind-fire, land-use, and ward at that station-hour. This is the training table; grid-cell features for inference are built on demand via vayu.features.grid_features using the same definitions.

conventions.ts_utc: tz-aware UTC timestamp (pandas datetime64[ns, UTC] / arrow timestamp[us, tz=UTC]); NOT a string. Storage is UTC; calendar/diurnal features are derived from Asia/Kolkata by the consumer via vayu.timeutils.calendar_features.
conventions.station_id: string = canonical OpenAQ location id. data.gov.in names are mapped via city station_match.
conventions.satellite_and_fire: s5p_*, aod550 columns are ALWAYS present; NaN when the GEE numeric path is off. frp_upwind/fire_count_upwind come from zero-auth FIRMS.
conventions.schema_stability: column set never changes with key state; manifest.sat_numeric flags whether satellite columns carry real values.

columns.name: co
columns.desc: CO measured (CPCB reports CO in mg/m3).

columns.name: wind_dir_10m
columns.desc: 10m wind direction, the direction wind blows FROM (clockwise from N).

columns.name: s5p_no2
columns.desc: Sentinel-5P TROPOMI NO2 column (GEE); NaN when off.

columns.name: s5p_so2
columns.desc: Sentinel-5P SO2 column (GEE); NaN when off.

columns.name: s5p_co
columns.desc: Sentinel-5P CO column (GEE); NaN when off.

columns.name: s5p_aai
columns.desc: Sentinel-5P aerosol index (GEE); NaN when off.

columns.name: aod550
columns.desc: MODIS MAIAC AOD 550nm (GEE MCD19A2); NaN when off.

columns.name: frp_upwind
columns.desc: Sum FRP of FIRMS fires in the +/-45deg upwind sector, trailing 24h, <=100km.

columns.name: fire_count_upwind
columns.desc: Count of upwind FIRMS fires (0 when none).

columns.name: road_density
columns.desc: OSM road length per area in a 500m projected buffer.

columns.name: builtup_frac
columns.desc: Built-up land fraction in the 500m buffer (0-1).

columns.name: industrial_dist_km
columns.desc: Projected distance to nearest OSM industrial land-use.
